_comment: NovaSpark Bot Config — Save as novaspark.config.json in your bot repo root. The platform auto-reads it on deploy.
name: My Bot
description: A short description of what your bot does
_session_dir_comment: Folder where WhatsApp auth session files are stored. Platform backs this up so you don't re-scan QR on every restart. Common: auth_info_baileys, session, .session, auth
_config_file_comment: If your bot reads config from a JS file instead of process.env, set this so the platform can write your env vars into it automatically.
